category.title: Select Issue Category
category.subtitle: Choose the category that best describes the issue you want to report.
category.potholeDesc: Damaged roads, potholes, or street cave-ins.
category.garbageDesc: Overflowing bins, uncollected waste, or littering.
category.streetlightDesc: Broken streetlights or dark zones on public roads.
category.waterDesc: Burst pipes, open sewers, or water wastage.
category.trafficDesc: Blocked roads, illegal parking, or signal issues.
category.safetyDesc: Hazardous structures, open manholes, or safety concerns.
category.otherDesc: Any other civic problem not listed above.

details.title: Report Details
details.subtitle: Provide as much detail as possible. You can use voice recording or type directly.
details.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail (e.g. location, landmark, severity, duration)...
details.voiceHelper: Click the microphone to speak your issue description in English or Hindi.
details.voiceUnsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser.
details.imageHelper: Drag and drop or click to upload a photo of the issue.

confirmation.message: Thank you for reporting this issue. The municipal department has been notified.

history.empty: You haven't submitted any reports yet.

validation.descTooShort: Description must be at least 10 characters long.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.
